# NYX Studio

NYX Studio is an AI-native content and growth agency for B2B, B2C, D2C, and Real Estate brands in India.

## Contact Information
- **Email**: official.nyxstudio@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://www.nyxstudio.in
- **Location**: Pune, Maharashtra, India (411047)
- **Instagram**: @nyxstudio.in
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/nyx-studio-ai/

## Founders
- **Atharv Paharia** (Co-Founder & Tech Lead): Leads AI engineering, automated content production pipelines, and technical systems.
- **Bhavya Jain** (Co-Founder & Product Lead): Leads brand growth strategy, product engineering, and partner-facing client portals.

## Niche Specialization
We construct high-converting vertical video assets, performance ad campaigns, influencer marketing systems, and messaging funnels.
- **Niche Focus**: D2C, B2C, B2B, and Real Estate sectors.
- **Client Portfolio & Partners**: Dessertino, Habibs, Newton School, and many more.

## Service Packages & Pricing
- **Trial Pack (₹30,000 / month)**: 30-day pilot. Includes a custom content strategy, 4 high-production reels, 4 static graphics, and 1 carousel post. Ideal for brands testing content-driven performance channels.
- **Starter Pack (₹50,000 / month)**: Monthly retainer. Includes custom content strategy, 8 reels, 6 static graphics, and active paid social ad management.
- **Growth Pack (₹80,000 / month)**: Monthly retainer. End-to-end multi-platform content production, paid media operations, influencer management, and SMS/WhatsApp CRM funnel strategy. Formulated for brands scaling past ₹1Cr/month.

## Turnaround Time & Workflow
- **Cinematic Reels**: 5-7 business days from brief approval to final delivery.
- **AI-generated Video / Product Films**: 48-72 hours when no live shoot is required.

## Key Definitions & Performance Terminology
- **Hook Rate**: The percentage of feed viewers watching past the first 3 seconds of a reel. Target: 40%+.
- **Thumb-stop Ratio**: The share of a feed audience that pauses scrolling long enough to register the brand (3-second views divided by impressions).
- **Creative Refresh Cadence**: Meta refreshes every 7-14 days to prevent audience fatigue and rise of CPM.
